---
title: "Marketing Analytics"
listing:
  contents: posts
  exclude:
    - posts/current-trends-answer-engine-optimization/index.qmd
    - posts/current-trends-marketing-research-digital-twins/index.qmd
    - posts/ecomm-dash/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
